name: bioexperiment-suite

metadata.name: bioexperiment-suite
metadata.summary: Python toolbox for managing biological experiment devices including pumps, cell density detectors, thermometers, and other related equipment.

documentation:
# BioExperiment Suite

Python toolbox for managing biological experiment devices (pumps, cell density detectors etc.) and setting up experiments.

## Table of Contents

- [Introduction](#introduction)
- [Features](#features)
- [Installation](#installation)
- [Usage](#usage)
- [License](#license)

## Introduction

This project is a Python toolbox for managing biological experiment devices (pumps, cell density detectors etc.) and setting up experiments. Communication protocol is specific for devices produced by my lab in [Institute of Protein Research RAS](https://protres.ru/en), so it may not be suitable for other devices, but you can easily adapt it for your needs by overriding corresponding methods. The toolbox is designed to be easily extensible and customizable.

## Features

- Abstraction above COM-port communication
- Automatic device discovery
- High-level API for device control
- Easy-to-use experiment setup
- Scrupulous logging
- Graphical user interface (in development)

## Installation

To install the package, you can use `pip`:

```sh
pip install bioexperiment-suite
```

or with GUI support:

```sh
pip install bioexperiment-suite[gui]
```

### Prerequisites

Ensure you have the following installed on your machine:

- Python 3.12 or higher
- [Windows CH340 Driver](https://sparks.gogo.co.nz/ch340.html) (for Windows users if not installed already)

## Usage

For comprehensive usage examples, please see the [examples](examples) directory.

## License

This project is licensed under the [MIT License](LICENSE).

classes.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.serial_connection.SerialConnection

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.serial_connection.SerialConnection.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the serial connection object.

```
param port

The serial port to connect to

param baudrate

The baudrate of the serial connection. Defaults to 9600

param timeout_sec

The timeout of the serial connection to respond in seconds. Defaults to 1.0

raises serial.SerialException

If the serial connection cannot be established
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.serial_connection.SerialConnection._create_serial_connection
documentation: Creates a serial connection with the specified parameters.

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.serial_connection.SerialConnection._restore_connection
documentation:
Decorator to restore the serial connection if it is lost during communication.

```
param method

The method to decorate

returns

The decorated method
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.serial_connection.SerialConnection.write_to_serial_port
documentation:
Writes data to the serial port.

```
param data_to_send

The data to send to the serial port
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.serial_connection.SerialConnection.read_from_serial_port
documentation:
Reads data from the serial port.

```
param response_bytes

The number of bytes to read from the serial port

returns

The response from the serial port
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.serial_connection.SerialConnection.communicate_with_serial_port
documentation:
Communicates with the serial port by sending data and receiving a response.

```
param data_to_send

The data to send to the serial port

param response_bytes

The number of bytes to read from the serial port as a response

returns

The response from the serial port
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.serial_connection.SerialConnection._bytes_to_int
documentation:
Converts a byte array to an integer.

```
param bytes

The byte array to convert to an integer

returns

The integer representation of the byte array
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.serial_connection.SerialConnection._int_to_bytes
documentation:
Converts an integer to a byte array.

```
param integer

The integer to convert to a byte array

param n_bytes

The number of bytes to represent the integer. Defaults to None.

returns

The byte array representation of the integer
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.serial_connection.SerialConnection.__del__
documentation: Closes the serial connection when the object is deleted.
Class to handle serial communication with a device connected to a serial port.

```

The serial port to connect to

The baudrate of the serial connection. Defaults to 9600

The timeout of the serial connection to respond in seconds. Defaults to 1.0
```

documentation: Computes the calibration volume of the pump.

documentation:
Computes the speed parameter from the real speed of the pump.

```
param flow

The real flow rate of the pump in mL/min

returns

The speed parameter to send to the pump
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.pump.Pump._compute_step_volume_bytes
documentation:
Computes the step volume in bytes to send to the pump.

```
param volume

The volume to set in mL

returns

The byte representation of the volume
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.pump.Pump.set_default_flow_rate
documentation:
Sets the default flow rate of the pump.

```
param flow_rate

The flow rate to set in mL/min
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.pump.Pump._set_flow_rate
documentation:
Sets the flow rate of the pump before pouring in volume.

```
param flow_rate

The flow rate to set in mL/min
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.pump.Pump.pour_in_volume
documentation:
Pours in the specified volume of liquid.

```
param volume

The volume to pour in mL

param flow_rate

The flow rate of the pump in mL/min

param direction

The direction of the pump, either "left" or "right". Defaults to "left"
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.pump.Pump.start_continuous_rotation
documentation:
Starts the continuous rotation of the pump.

```
param flow_rate

The flow rate of the pump in mL/min

param direction

The direction of the pump, either "left" or "right". Defaults to "left"
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.interfaces.pump.Pump.stop_continuous_rotation
documentation: Stops the continuous rotation of the pump
Class to handle communication with a pump connected to a serial port.

classes.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.collections.Relation

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.collections.Relation.EQUALS_TO
documentation: Returns a relation checking if a metric equals the given value.

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.collections.Relation.GREATER_THAN
documentation: Returns a relation checking if a metric is greater than the given value.

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.collections.Relation.LESS_THAN
documentation: Returns a relation checking if a metric is less than the given value.

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.collections.Relation.GREATER_THAN_OR_EQUALS_TO
documentation: Returns a relation checking if a metric is greater than or equal to the given value.

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.collections.Relation.LESS_THAN_OR_EQUALS_TO
documentation: Returns a relation checking if a metric is less than or equal to the given value.

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.collections.Relation.NOT_EQUALS_TO
documentation: Returns a relation checking if a metric does not equal the given value.
Class to define common relations for conditional actions.

```
The timeout of the serial connection to respond in seconds. Defaults to 1.0
```

Gets the temperature of the spectrophotometer

classes.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.actions.Action

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.actions.Action.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the action with the function to be executed and the arguments to be passed to it.

```
param func

The function to be executed

param args

The positional arguments to be passed to the function

param kwargs

The keyword arguments to be passed to the function
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.actions.Action.execute
documentation: Execute the action by calling the function with the provided arguments and tracking the start and end time.

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.actions.Action.is_completed
documentation:
Check if the action has been completed.

```
return

True if the action has been completed, False otherwise
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.actions.Action.duration
documentation:
Get the duration of the action.

```
return

The duration of the action as a timedelta

raises ValueError

If the action has not been completed yet
```

Class to define an action to be executed in an experiment.

The action can be executed with the `execute` method, which will call the function with the provided arguments.
The action keeps track of the time it was started and completed.

classes.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.actions.Measurement

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.actions.Measurement.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the measurement with the function to be executed, the measured value name, and the arguments.

```
param func

The function to be executed

param measurement_name

The name of the measured value

param args

The positional arguments to be passed to the function

param kwargs

The keyword arguments to be passed to the function
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.actions.Measurement.execute
documentation:
Execute the measurement by calling the function with the provided arguments and tracking the start and end time.

```
return

The result of the measurement
```

Class to define a measurement to be executed in an experiment.

The measurement is a special type of action that also stores the measured value name and the measurement result.

classes.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.actions.WaitAction

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.actions.WaitAction.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the wait action with the number of seconds to wait.

```
param seconds

The number of seconds to wait
```

Class to define a wait action to be executed in an experiment.

The wait action is a special type of action that pauses the execution of the experiment for a given amount of time.
If some action takes time to be executed, the wait time should be not less than the time taken by the action.

classes.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Metric

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Metric.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the metric to be used in the experiment

```
param experiment

The experiment object

param measurement_name

The name of the measurement in the experiment to use for the metric calculation

param statistic

The statistic to apply to the measurement values
```
Class to define a metric to be used during the experiment run to make dynamic decisions

classes.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Condition

Initialize the condition for the action to be executed.

```
param metric

The metric to evaluate.

param relation

A callable that takes the metric's value and returns a boolean.
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Condition.check_condition
documentation:
Check if the condition is met.

```
return

True if the condition is met, False otherwise.
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Condition.negation
documentation: Return a new condition that is the negation of this condition.
Class to define a condition to determine if an action should be executed.

classes.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.ConditionalAction

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.ConditionalAction.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the conditional action with the condition and the action to be executed

```

The condition to evaluate

param action

The action to execute if the condition is met
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.ConditionalAction.get_action
documentation:
Return the action to be executed if the
condition is met, otherwise return None.
Class to define action to be executed based on a condition.

classes.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Experiment

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Experiment.__init__
documentation: Initialize the experiment with an empty list of actions and measurements

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Experiment.create_metric
documentation:
Create a metric object to be used in the experiment for making dynamic decisions.

```
param measurement_name

The name of the measurement in the experiment to use for the metric calculation

param statistic

The statistic to apply to the measurement values

return

The metric object
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Experiment.specify_output_dir
documentation:
Specify the output directory to write measurements to CSV files.

```
param output_dir

The directory to write measurements to
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Experiment.add_action
documentation:
Add an action to the experiment.

The action will be executed in sequence when the experiment is run.

```
param func

The function to be executed

param condition

The condition to evaluate before executing the action

param args

The positional arguments to be passed to the function

param kwargs

The keyword arguments to be passed to the function
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Experiment.add_measurement
documentation:
Add a measurement to the experiment.

The measurement will be executed in sequence when the experiment is run, and the result will be stored.

```
param func

The function to be executed

param measurement_name

The name of the measured value

param condition

The condition to evaluate before executing the action

param args

The positional arguments to be passed to the function

param kwargs

The keyword arguments to be passed to the function
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Experiment.add_wait
documentation:
Add a wait action to the experiment.

The wait action will pause the execution of the experiment for the given amount of time.

```
param seconds

The number of seconds to wait

param condition

The condition to evaluate before executing the action
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Experiment._perform_action
documentation:
Perform the action by executing it or waiting for the specified time.

```
param action

The action to perform
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Experiment._run
documentation: Run the experiment by executing each action in sequence.

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Experiment.start
documentation:
Start the experiment by running it in idle mode or in a separate thread depending on the `start_in_background` flag.

```
param start_in_background

If True, start the experiment in a separate thread.
```

If False, run the experiment in the current thread. Be careful with this option,
as it will block the current thread until the experiment is finished!

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Experiment.stop
documentation: Stop the experiment by setting the stop event.

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Experiment.write_measurement_to_csv
documentation:
Write last acquired measurement to a CSV file.

```
param measurement_name

The name of the measurement to write to a CSV file
```

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Experiment.reset_experiment
documentation: Reset the experiment by clearing the actions, measurements and current time.

methods.name: bioexperiment_suite.experiment.experiment.Experiment._validate_types
documentation:
Validate that the arguments passed to the function are of the correct type.

```
param func

The function to validate the arguments for

param args

The positional arguments to validate

param kwargs

The keyword arguments to validate

raises TypeError

If any argument is not of the expected type according to the type hints of the function
```

Class to define an experiment with actions and measurements to be executed in sequence.

The experiment can be run with the `run` method, which will execute each action in sequence.
The experiment keeps track of the time each action was executed and the measurements taken.

functions.name: bioexperiment_suite.tools.devices.identify_device
documentation:
Identifies the device connected to the specified serial port.

```
param port

The serial port name to identify the device connected to

returns

The device name of the device connected to the specified serial port, None otherwise
```

functions.name: bioexperiment_suite.tools.devices.get_connected_devices
documentation:
Identifies the devices connected to the serial ports on the system.

:returns: A tuple containing the list of connected pumps and spectrophotometers

functions.name: bioexperiment_suite.tools.serial_port.get_serial_ports
documentation:
Lists serial port names on the system.

```
returns

A list of the serial ports available on the system

raises EnvironmentError

On unsupported or unknown platforms
```

class_variables.name: bioexperiment_suite.gui.device_widgets.DeviceWidget.instance_count
documentation: Class variable to keep track of the number of instances
